discoveries.title: Engagement Rate Over Total Engagement
discoveries.detail: A higher engagement rate (engagements per impression) is more impactful than total engagement numbers.
discoveries.sourceDesc: Hashmeta article on Twitter algorithm changes

discoveries.title: Video Content Boosts Impressions by 20%
discoveries.detail: X's algorithm prioritizes video posts, increasing impressions by up to 20% compared to text posts.

discoveries.title: Engagement Speed Over Total Engagement
discoveries.detail: The speed of engagement matters more than total engagement; rapid interactions boost content visibility.

discoveries.title: Replies Ranked Separately, Blue Users First
discoveries.detail: Replies are ranked separately, with Twitter Blue users' replies prioritized in conversations.

discoveries.title: Twitter Blue Subscribers Get 2-4x More Reach
discoveries.detail: Twitter Blue subscribers receive 2-4 times more initial reach compared to non-subscribers.

discoveries.title: External Links Penalized 30-50%
discoveries.detail: Tweets containing external links are penalized, reducing reach by 30-50% to keep users on the platform.

discoveries.title: First 2 Hours Critical for Engagement
discoveries.detail: The initial 2-hour period after posting is crucial; early engagement significantly influences content reach.

discoveries.title: Retweets 20x More Valuable Than Likes
discoveries.detail: Twitter's open-source code reveals retweets are weighted 20 times more than likes in content ranking.

discoveries.title: Grok AI Enhances Content Relevance
discoveries.detail: The integration of Grok AI in the Explore tab provides AI-written summaries explaining trending topics, enhancing content relevance.
discoveries.sourceDesc: Sprout Social article on How the Twitter (X) Algorithm Works in 2026
discoveries.searchQuery: Twitter X algorithm changes 2025 ranking engagement

discoveries.title: Algorithm Favors Rich Media Content
discoveries.detail: Tweets with rich media (images, videos, GIFs, polls) are favored by the algorithm due to their higher engagement potential.
discoveries.sourceDesc: Sprout Social article on How the Twitter (X) Algorithm Works in 2026
discoveries.searchQuery: Twitter X algorithm changes 2025 ranking engagement

discoveries.title: X Premium Replies Prioritized in Conversations
discoveries.detail: Replies from X Premium subscribers are algorithmically prioritized to appear at the top of conversation threads, enhancing their visibility.
discoveries.sourceDesc: Sprout Social article on How the Twitter (X) Algorithm Works in 2026
discoveries.searchQuery: Twitter X algorithm changes 2025 ranking engagement

discoveries.title: External Links Penalized by 30-50% in Reach
discoveries.detail: Tweets containing external links are penalized, reducing their reach by 30-50%, as X aims to keep users on the platform.
discoveries.sourceDesc: Hashmeta article on How the Twitter (X) Algorithm Works in 2025
discoveries.searchQuery: Twitter X algorithm changes 2025 ranking engagement

discoveries.title: Replies and Quote Tweets Carry Higher Engagement Weight
discoveries.detail: Engagement types are weighted differently: Replies (13.5x), Quote Tweets (15x), and Retweets (20x) have higher multipliers compared to Likes (1x).
discoveries.sourceDesc: XLab article on Twitter Algorithm Explained 2026
discoveries.searchQuery: Twitter X algorithm changes 2025 ranking engagement

discoveries.title: Time Decay Reduces Tweet Visibility by 50% Every 6 Hours
discoveries.detail: A tweet loses approximately 50% of its visibility potential every 6 hours, emphasizing the importance of early engagement.
discoveries.sourceDesc: XLab article on Twitter Algorithm Explained 2026
discoveries.searchQuery: Twitter X algorithm changes 2025 ranking engagement

discoveries.title: X Premium Subscribers Receive 2-4x More Reach
discoveries.detail: X Premium subscribers' tweets are initially shown to 40-80% of their followers, compared to 10-20% for non-subscribers, effectively granting a 2-4x reach advantage.
discoveries.sourceDesc: Hashmeta article on Twitter Algorithm Changes 2025
discoveries.searchQuery: Twitter X algorithm changes 2025 ranking engagement

discoveries.title: Open-Sourced Algorithm Reveals Engagement Weights
discoveries.detail: In March 2023, X (formerly Twitter) open-sourced parts of its recommendation algorithm, revealing specific engagement multipliers: Retweets (20x), Quote Tweets (15x), Replies (13.5x), Profile Clicks (12x), Link Clicks (11x), Bookmarks (10x), and Likes (1x).
discoveries.sourceDesc: Hashmeta article on Twitter Algorithm Changes 2025
discoveries.searchQuery: Twitter X algorithm changes 2025 ranking engagement
